When the Stakes Are Absolute, So Are We.

High-stakes civil litigation. Corporate disputes. Complex divorce. Estate contests. Hargrove & Associates represents those who cannot afford to lose.

25+ Years Combined Litigation Experience
$500M+ In Client Assets Protected
Los Angeles Superior Court & Ninth Circuit
100% Discretion For Every Client, On Every Matter
[Icon]

Civil Litigation

Contract disputes. Business torts. Injunctive relief. We litigate the cases other firms decline.
[Icon]

Corporate Disputes

Shareholder conflicts. Partnership dissolutions. Fiduciary breaches. Your business deserves a warrior.
[Icon]

High-Conflict Divorce

Complex asset division. Spousal support. Child custody. Protecting what you built — fiercely and discreetly.
[Icon]

Estate & Will Litigation

Will contests. Trust disputes. Undue influence claims. Inheritance is a right worth fighting for.
"The courtroom is our domain. Results are our currency. We do not settle for settlements — we fight for victories."
— James R. Hargrove, Founding Partner

Boutique Firm. Big-Firm Firepower.

We take fewer cases than the large firms. That means your matter receives the full attention of senior counsel — not a first-year associate — from intake through verdict.

Every Case Is a High-Stakes Case.

We don't have a mass-market practice. Every client we accept faces a legal challenge that genuinely matters. That shapes how we work, how we prepare, and how we fight.

Los Angeles Is Our Courthouse.

We have spent decades in LA's courts — Superior Court, the Ninth Circuit, and federal districts across California. We know the judges, the procedures, and the pressure points.

COUNSEL

The Attorneys Who Stand Between You and Your Worst Outcome

Each attorney at Hargrove & Associates was chosen not just for their credentials — but for their record, their resolve, and their refusal to accept anything less than a win.

"I had been through two other firms before I found Hargrove. In three months, they accomplished what others spent two years failing to do. They changed the outcome of my life."
— Corporate Executive, Los Angeles
"The discretion alone was worth everything. They handled my divorce without a single leak to the press. And they won every single asset dispute we brought to the table."
— Private Investor, Beverly Hills
"I was contesting a will that had been manipulated in the final weeks of my father's life. Hargrove's team proved it. They gave my family justice we thought was impossible."
— Estate Heir, Los Angeles

Your Case Deserves Counsel That Has Won Before.

If you are facing a legal matter of consequence — a business dispute, a complex divorce, a contested estate — do not wait. The decisions made in the first days of a case often determine the final outcome. We are available for confidential consultations by appointment.
